title: 川崎記念の後に・ぎゅるるん！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon scores a fantastic victory at the
Kawasaki Kinen, displaying an overwhelming
speed no one else could keep up with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can feel her own strength, and gains
confidence that she can run internationally one
day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I invite Smart Falcon out to celebrate her victory,
but she declines the offer so she can notch up
more victories.
